calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Mar-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for and with Katya George.

The Court stated that it had read all the documents. Ms. Katya George was sworn and testified as to the contact that was made in Brazil at the consulate and testified as to the substance of the conversation. Ms. George provided additional testimony stating that the last contact was three years ago when the dental records were received, that she was told to file a report here, that she did file that report and came up with nothing, and that the Social Security payments have continued but they have sat in the credit union untouched. In addition, she stated that she had solicited a friend with the airline to spread the word about her mother and to check the hotel where her mother stayed. The Court finds that the information in the verified petition is sufficient to establish beyond a reasonable doubt that Jan Blair is deceased and that there have been efforts to contact her since 2000 with no success. The Court finds that September 14, 2000 is the date of death of Jan Blair in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. The petition is granted (subject to a written order).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Shannon.
